title: The Dolomphious Duck,
content:
The Dolomphious Duck,
    who caught Spotted Frogs for her dinner
    with a Runcible Spoon.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Edward Lear delivers a powerful performance in "The Dolomphious Duck,"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
